title: Neco Arc Modification
description: Neco Arc in minecraft. Be curios, be scared - she's here
body:
From now you be allowed to spawn Neco Arc mob in your world. Adds cola, pilk, neco-armor and neco arc.

![NEcooco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b86b78068998cda70ccb8cd8f95a1d672e128ab.png)

Gamerule "canNecoSpawnEverywhere" allow to spawn Neco Arc mob all over the world. But be careful, she can multiply itself, use some items, like TNT, food, pilk.

Items that can be used to interact with the entity:

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a70b6314dd9670c3244f28d2442a3d07db37ce98.png)

You can shear Neco Arc for Neco-blocks for Neco-portal and Neco-armor, that allows you to command your Neco-army.

Some records:

![music](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7fcdd7535318763b6039cc7b89490426cccdcf9.png)

Pet it, kick it, burn it - I don't care
-
-
-
Mod made with MCreator and Blockbench!

Мод поддерживает русский язык!
El mod es compatible con el idioma español!
Мод кыргыз тилин колдойт!
変更は日本語をサポートしています！
The mod supports English!
Le mod ne supporte pas la langue française!
